_comment: Copy this file to infra/parameters.json (gitignored) and fill in values. NEVER put real passwords in a tracked file. deploy.ps1 prompts for the two secure passwords so you can leave them out here.
_sizeNote: VM sizes vary by subscription offer and region. If deploy fails with SkuNotAvailable/NotAvailableForSubscription, pick sizes that are available: az vm list-skus -l <region> --resource-type virtualMachines --query "[?!(restrictions)].name" -o tsv
